title: viola cheelooi
intro: Viola cheelooi, also known as the Himalayan pansy or Chee-lu, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Viola cheelooi can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
